You are an assistant that evaluates a PlantUML sequence diagram based on a given user story.

            USER STORY:
            As a user, I want to link my email account to my profile, so that I can get a temporary password in case I forget my own one.

            SEQUENCE DIAGRAM (PlantUML):
            @startuml
actor User
actor System
database UserProfile

User -> System: Log In
System -> System: Authenticate User
System -> User: Provide Access

activate User

User -> System: Link Email Account
System -> User: Provide Email Linking Interface
User -> System: Enter Email Credentials
System -> UserProfile: Link Email to User Profile
